name: NYC Events Calendar
refresh: official City of New York events feed (api.nyc.gov/calendar/search)
notes: Official NYC Events Calendar API (powers nyc.gov 'Find Local Events'), served via the api.nyc.gov Azure API Management gateway. Requires the free 'NYC 311 Public Developers'/Event Calendar product subscription key, sent as Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key via the NYC_API_KEY env var. Endpoint + fields confirmed live 2026-06-21 against /calendar/search: response { items: [...], pagination }, fixed 12 upcoming events per page (no date params — default is today-forward, ascending). Items carry no lat/lng (address is freeform text), so no geo filter; city-wide events shown for any NYC point. autoApprove:true (city-official trust tier 80).
